error_signature: SAML Authentication failed. Invalid SAML response
title: Invalid SAML response during Entra ID SSO setup
symptom: When attempting to set up SSO with Entra ID, n8n throws an error indicating 'SAML Authentication failed. Invalid SAML response' due to missing attributes.
not_this_if: All required attributes are present in the SAML response
root_cause: The error occurs because the SAML response from Entra ID does not include the attributes that n8n expects, such as UPN, firstname, and lastname. This mismatch prevents successful authentication.
fix_steps: Access the M365 Entra admin portal
Modify the claims being sent in the SAML response to include the required attributes
Test the SSO setup again in n8n
agent_instruction: Ensure the SAML response includes the required attributes by modifying the claims in the Entra admin portal.
